name: montezuma_frontier_recovery_curriculum
description: Montezuma shows collapse to zero recent reward despite long episodes; bias training toward frontier states, recoverable trajectories, and key-door completion micro-goals.
llm_notes: 300 episodes with recent20_mean=0.0 indicates sparse-reward starvation. Increase exploration persistence and shorten dream interval to improve planning frequency.

name: breakout_stability_then_speed
description: Breakout is stochastic+dense with low but nonzero reward; prioritize consistency before high-reward streak chasing.
llm_notes: 500 episodes, recent20_mean=0.8 and flat trend suggest noisy local policy. Slightly lower advisory use and longer horizon should reduce oscillation.

name: frogger_lane_phase_model
description: Frogger maintains moderate reward but plateaus; introduce lane-phase timing abstractions and selective risk pulses near completion states.
llm_notes: 500 episodes, recent20_mean above global mean but trend still flat. Improve temporal abstraction rather than raw exploration magnitude.

name: cartpole_relearn_foundation
description: CartPole performance is far below expected solved regime, indicating value-estimation instability; re-stabilize baseline control objective.
llm_notes: 1200 episodes with mean~13 implies core control policy has not consolidated. Treat as diagnostic anchor task and repair before trusting transfer metrics.

name: instrumentation_check_dreamer_reliance_lock
description: Cross-game diagnostics show dreamer_reliance fixed at 0.5 in all games; verify whether adaptive advisory calibration is disabled or clipped.
llm_notes: No PRINCIPLE ops emitted: the strongest apparent cross-game pattern is an instrumentation confound (constant reliance=0.5), which can invalidate causal conclusions.
